InputSection.placeholder: Ask a specific business research question, and atypica.AI will provide a detailed business report through 10-20 minutes of 'deep reasoning'.

FeaturedStudies.title: Featured Research
FeaturedStudies.description: Explore our curated selection of research studies

FeaturedStudiesPage.title: Featured Studies
FeaturedStudiesPage.description: Browse our collection of market research and analysis
FeaturedStudiesPage.noStudies: No studies found in this category.

create.title: Create Interview Project
create.description: Start your research project by giving it a name and selecting a category. You'll refine the details later.
create.titlePlaceholder: E.g., Market Research for New Product
create.titleDescription: Give your project a clear, descriptive name.
create.typeDescription: This helps the interview expert tailor its approach.
create.afterCreateDescription: After creating your project, you'll be taken to a chat interface where you can define your research objectives and project brief.

validation.titleMin: Title must be at least 3 characters

emptyState.title: No interview projects yet
emptyState.description: Create your first project to start collecting insights through expert interviews.

projectDetail.clarifyPrompt: Click "Clarify Project brief" to define your research brief and objectives.
projectDetail.noObjectives: No objectives defined yet. Use the "Clarify Project brief" button to define your research objectives.
projectDetail.noCollectSessionsDesc: Create interviews to collect insights from others without requiring them to create an account.
projectDetail.noClarifySessionError: No clarify session found. Please contact support.

createCollectSession.title: Create interview
createCollectSession.description: Create a session link you can share with participants to collect their insights.
createCollectSession.sessionTitleDesc: Give this session a descriptive name
createCollectSession.notesDesc: Optional notes for your reference (not visible to participants)
createCollectSession.notesPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this session is for...
createCollectSession.expirationDesc: Set when this session should expire (optional)

validation.titleMin: Title must be at least 3 characters

digestDialog.title: Interview Digest
digestDialog.description: A comprehensive compilation of all interviews in this project
digestDialog.noDigestYet: No digest available yet. Click the Generate button below to create one.

clarifySession.interviewInProgress: Chat with atypica.AI to clarify project requirements
clarifySession.interviewDescription: atypica.AI will ask questions about this project. Please provide detailed answers to help clarify project requirements and better plan user interviews.
clarifySession.clarifyCompletionDescription: The project requirements clarification process is now complete. You can now proceed to conduct user interviews.

collectSession.interviewDescription: This is an automated interview to collect your insights. Your responses will help inform the research or project. The interview is conversational, please answer questions as thoroughly as you can.
collectSession.privacyNotice: Your responses will be used for research purposes only.
collectSession.thankYouMessage: Your responses have been recorded. Thank you for participating in this interview and sharing your valuable insights.

guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.tip1: Create a research topic to conduct user interviews using AI
guide.tip2: Click on a card to view interview subjects, content, and full reports

guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.tip1: Add more interview subjects to gain more comprehensive insights
guide.tip2: Select individual interviews one by one, or use "Start All Interviews" to begin in batch
guide.tip3: Generate reports at any time during interviews, or generate a final report after all interviews are completed

ReportDialog.completeMessage: The report has been generated. Click the button below to view the full report.
ReportDialog.waitMessage: Generating research report, please do not close this window. You will be notified when the generation is complete.

PasswordReset.resetLinkText: Click here to reset your password
PasswordReset.expirationNote: This link will expire in 30 minutes.
PasswordReset.ignoreMessage: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email.
PasswordReset.resetInstructions: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password:
PasswordReset.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

Verification.expirationNote: This code will expire in 30 minutes.
Verification.ignoreMessage: If you didn't request this code, please ignore this email.
Verification.useCodeInstructions: Please use the following code to verify your email address:
Verification.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

ReportCompletion.reportReadyText: Your study report for "{topic}" has been successfully generated and is now available for viewing.
ReportCompletion.viewStudyText: You can access your report by visiting the study
ReportCompletion.viewStudyMessage: Please visit the study to view your report:
ReportCompletion.thanksMessage: Thank you for using atypica.AI for your study needs. We hope the insights provided are valuable to you.
ReportCompletion.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

StudyInterruption.interruptionText: Your study on "{topic}" was unexpectedly interrupted. Don't worry, your progress has been saved.
StudyInterruption.continueInstructionsText: You can continue your study by clicking the button below and then typing "continue" in the chat box or clicking the Continue button.
StudyInterruption.supportText: If you encounter any issues, please click the chat icon in the bottom right corner of the study page for assistance.
StudyInterruption.thanksMessage: Thank you for your patience and for using atypica.AI for your study needs.
StudyInterruption.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

Verify.title: Verify Your Email
Verify.description: We've sent a verification code to {email}. Please enter it below.
Verify.successMessage: Email verified successfully! You can now sign in.
Verify.codeResent: Verification code resent. Please check your email.

ForgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If your email is registered with us, you will receive password reset instructions shortly.
ForgotPassword.userNotFound: No account found with this email address
ForgotPassword.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox.

ResetPassword.title: Reset Password
ResetPassword.description: Please enter a new password for your account.
ResetPassword.successMessage: Password reset successful! You can now sign in with your new password.

StatusDisplay.background: atypica is running in the background
StatusDisplay.error: An error occurred, please refresh the page and try again
StatusDisplay.confirmAbortDescription: This will stop the current background task. The results may be incomplete.
StatusDisplay.continueInstructions: To continue later, type "continue" in the chat box.
StatusDisplay.evictionWarningMessage: The background task may have stalled. Consider canceling and restarting by typing "continue".

hints.tip1: More specific descriptions lead to more accurate user matches
